---
title: "test_phase_89_verification.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_phase_89_verification.py"
loc: 39
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.79
---

## Intent
The `test_phase_89_verification.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_db, test_mimir_aesthetic_breach, test_mimir_structural_breach, test_mimir_maintainability_suggestion, test_rpc_suggestion_retrieval. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_db, test_mimir_aesthetic_breach, test_mimir_structural_breach, test_mimir_maintainability_suggestion, test_rpc_suggestion_retrieval. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)

### Exports
- `mock_db`
- `test_mimir_aesthetic_breach`
- `test_mimir_structural_breach`
- `test_mimir_maintainability_suggestion`
- `test_rpc_suggestion_retrieval`
